# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

pub enum zenavif_parse::Error
pub zenavif_parse::Error::InvalidData(&'static str)
pub zenavif_parse::Error::Io(std::io::error::Error)
pub zenavif_parse::Error::NoMoov
pub zenavif_parse::Error::OutOfMemory
pub zenavif_parse::Error::ResourceLimitExceeded(&'static str)
pub zenavif_parse::Error::Stopped(enough::reason::StopReason)
pub zenavif_parse::Error::UnexpectedEOF
pub zenavif_parse::Error::Unsupported(&'static str)
impl core::convert::From<alloc::collections::TryReserveError> for zenavif_parse::Error
pub fn zenavif_parse::Error::from(alloc::collections::TryReserveError) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<alloc::string::FromUtf8Error> for zenavif_parse::Error
pub fn zenavif_parse::Error::from(alloc::string::FromUtf8Error) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<bitreader::BitReaderError> for zenavif_parse::Error
pub fn zenavif_parse::Error::from(bitreader::BitReaderError) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<core::num::error::TryFromIntError> for zenavif_parse::Error
pub fn zenavif_parse::Error::from(core::num::error::TryFromIntError) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<enough::reason::StopReason> for zenavif_parse::Error
pub fn zenavif_parse::Error::from(enough::reason::StopReason) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<std::io::error::Error> for zenavif_parse::Error
pub fn zenavif_parse::Error::from(std::io::error::Error) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<zenavif_parse::Error> for std::io::error::Error
pub fn std::io::error::Error::from(zenavif_parse::Error) -> Self
impl core::error::Error for zenavif_parse::Error
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenavif_parse::Error
pub fn zenavif_parse::Error::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for zenavif_parse::Error
pub fn zenavif_parse::Error::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenavif_parse::Error
impl core::marker::Send for zenavif_parse::Error
impl core::marker::Sync for zenavif_parse::Error
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenavif_parse::Error
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenavif_parse::Error
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenavif_parse::Error
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenavif_parse::Error
pub struct zenavif_parse::AV1Config
pub zenavif_parse::AV1Config::bit_depth: u8
pub zenavif_parse::AV1Config::chroma_sample_position: u8
pub zenavif_parse::AV1Config::chroma_subsampling_x: u8
pub zenavif_parse::AV1Config::chroma_subsampling_y: u8
pub zenavif_parse::AV1Config::level: u8
pub zenavif_parse::AV1Config::monochrome: bool
pub zenavif_parse::AV1Config::profile: u8
pub zenavif_parse::AV1Config::tier: u8
impl core::clone::Clone for zenavif_parse::AV1Config
pub fn zenavif_parse::AV1Config::clone(&self) -> zenavif_parse::AV1Config
impl core::cmp::Eq for zenavif_parse::AV1Config
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for zenavif_parse::AV1Config
pub fn zenavif_parse::AV1Config::eq(&self, &zenavif_parse::AV1Config) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenavif_parse::AV1Config
pub fn zenavif_parse::AV1Config::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

impl core::marker::Sync for zenavif_parse::AV1Config

pub struct zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>
impl<'data> zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::alpha_data(&self) -> core::option::Option<zenavif_parse::Result<alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::alpha_metadata(&self) -> core::option::Option<zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AV1Metadata>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::ambient_viewing(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::AmbientViewingEnvironment>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::animation_info(&self) -> core::option::Option<zenavif_parse::AnimationInfo>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::av1_config(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::AV1Config>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::clean_aperture(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::CleanAperture>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::color_info(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::ColorInformation>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::compatible_brands(&self) -> &[[u8; 4]]
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::content_colour_volume(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::ContentColourVolume>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::content_light_level(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::ContentLightLevel>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::depth_map(&self) -> core::option::Option<zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifDepthMap>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::depth_map_data(&self) -> core::option::Option<zenavif_parse::Result<alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::exif(&self) -> core::option::Option<zenavif_parse::Result<alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::frame(&self, usize) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::FrameRef<'_>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::frames(&self) -> zenavif_parse::FrameIterator<'_>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::from_bytes(&'data [u8]) -> zenavif_parse::Result<Self>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::from_bytes_with_config(&'data [u8], &zenavif_parse::DecodeConfig, &dyn enough::Stop) -> zenavif_parse::Result<Self>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::from_owned(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'static>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::from_owned_with_config(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, &zenavif_parse::DecodeConfig, &dyn enough::Stop) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'static>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::from_reader<R: std::io::Read>(&mut R) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'static>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::from_reader_with_config<R: std::io::Read>(&mut R, &zenavif_parse::DecodeConfig, &dyn enough::Stop) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'static>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::gain_map(&self) -> core::option::Option<zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifGainMap>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::gain_map_color_info(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::ColorInformation>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::gain_map_data(&self) -> core::option::Option<zenavif_parse::Result<alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::gain_map_metadata(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::GainMapMetadata>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::grid_config(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::GridConfig>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::grid_tile_count(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::has_depth_map(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::layer_selector(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::LayerSelector>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::layered_image_indexing(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::AV1LayeredImageIndexing>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::major_brand(&self) -> &[u8; 4]
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::mastering_display(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::MasteringDisplayColourVolume>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::mirror(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::ImageMirror>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::operating_point(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::OperatingPointSelector>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::pixel_aspect_ratio(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::premultiplied_alpha(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::primary_data(&self) -> zenavif_parse::Result<alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::primary_metadata(&self) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AV1Metadata>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::rotation(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zenavif_parse::ImageRotation>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::tile_data(&self, usize) -> zenavif_parse::Result<alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::to_avif_data(&self) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifData>
pub fn zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>::xmp(&self) -> core::option::Option<zenavif_parse::Result<alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>>>
impl<'data> core::marker::Freeze for zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>
impl<'data> core::marker::Send for zenavif_parse::AvifParser<'data>

impl core::clone::Clone for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
pub fn zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio::clone(&self) -> zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::cmp::Eq for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
pub fn zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio::eq(&self, &zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
pub fn zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::marker::Send for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::marker::Sync for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenavif_parse::PixelAspectRatio
pub fn zenavif_parse::read_avif<T: std::io::Read>(&mut T) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifData>
pub fn zenavif_parse::read_avif_with_config<T: std::io::Read>(&mut T, &zenavif_parse::DecodeConfig, &dyn enough::Stop) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifData>
pub fn zenavif_parse::read_avif_with_options<T: std::io::Read>(&mut T, &zenavif_parse::ParseOptions) -> zenavif_parse::Result<zenavif_parse::AvifData>
pub type zenavif_parse::Result<T, E> = core::result::Result<T, E>
